Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self:OnLoad() self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CANCELLING_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CANCELLING_TEXT;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigNumericInputMixin); self:OnLoad() self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_UNDERCUT_ITEMS_AHEAD_CLASSIC; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_UNDERCUT_ITEMS_AHEAD_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_UNDERCUT_ITEMS_AHEAD_TOOLTIP_TEXT;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorKeyBindingConfigMixin); self:OnLoad() self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CANCEL_UNDERCUT_SHORTCUT; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CANCEL_UNDERCUT_SHORTCUT_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CUSTOM_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUTS;
